name: Magic Kingdom
shortDescription: The most visited theme park in the world, centered on Cinderella Castle and classic Disney storytelling.
themeDescription: Fantasyland, Tomorrowland, Adventureland, Liberty Square, and Frontierland spread across a fairy-tale kingdom.
accessibilityLabel: Magic Kingdom, Walt Disney World, theme park opened in 1971.

name: EPCOT
shortDescription: A park celebrating technology, innovation, and world culture through immersive experiences and international pavilions.
themeDescription: World Discovery, World Celebration, World Nature, and World Showcase surround World Showcase Lagoon.
accessibilityLabel: EPCOT, Walt Disney World, theme park opened in 1982.

name: Hollywood Studios
shortDescription: A cinematic park blending Star Wars, Marvel, Pixar, and classic Hollywood magic.
themeDescription: Galaxy's Edge, Toy Story Land, and Animation Courtyard bring iconic films to life.
accessibilityLabel: Hollywood Studios, Walt Disney World, theme park opened in 1989.

name: Animal Kingdom
shortDescription: Disney's largest park by area, combining zoological experiences with Pandora and Africa-inspired adventures.
themeDescription: Pandora, Africa, Asia, and DinoLand surround the iconic Tree of Life.
accessibilityLabel: Animal Kingdom, Walt Disney World, theme park opened in 1998.

name: Disneyland Park
shortDescription: Walt Disney's original park and the only one he personally oversaw to completion, opened in 1955.
themeDescription: Main Street leads to Adventureland, New Orleans Square, Critter Country, Fantasyland, and Tomorrowland.
accessibilityLabel: Disneyland Park, Disneyland Resort, opened in 1955.

name: Disney California Adventure
shortDescription: A park celebrating California's culture, from Avengers Campus to Cars Land.
themeDescription: Avengers Campus, Cars Land, Pixar Pier, and Buena Vista Street capture California's spirit.
accessibilityLabel: Disney California Adventure, Disneyland Resort, opened in 2001.

name: Disneyland Park Paris
shortDescription: Europe's most visited theme park, featuring Sleeping Beauty Castle in a European fairy-tale setting.
themeDescription: Fantasyland, Adventureland, Frontierland, Discoveryland, and Main Street U.S.A. in a French countryside setting.
accessibilityLabel: Disneyland Park Paris, Disneyland Paris resort, opened in 1992.

name: Walt Disney Studios Park
shortDescription: A cinematic park adjacent to Disneyland Paris, expanding with a new lake district and Avengers Campus.
themeDescription: Marvel Avengers Campus, Toy Story Playland, and the new Lake District.
accessibilityLabel: Walt Disney Studios Park, Disneyland Paris resort, opened in 2002.

name: Tokyo Disneyland
shortDescription: Japan's beloved interpretation of the classic Disney park, known for its immaculate upkeep and Fantasyland.
themeDescription: World Bazaar, Tomorrowland, Toontown, Fantasyland, Adventureland, and Westernland.
accessibilityLabel: Tokyo Disneyland, Tokyo Disney Resort, opened in 1983.

name: Tokyo DisneySea
shortDescription: Often called the world's best theme park, with stunning port-city theming across seven unique seas.
themeDescription: Mediterranean Harbor, American Waterfront, Lost River Delta, Arabian Coast, Mermaid Lagoon, Mysterious Island, and Fantasy Springs.
accessibilityLabel: Tokyo DisneySea, Tokyo Disney Resort, opened in 2001.

name: Shanghai Disneyland
shortDescription: Disney's most technologically advanced park, blending Chinese culture with global Disney storytelling.
themeDescription: Treasure Cove, Tomorrowland, Mickey Avenue, Gardens of Imagination, Fantasyland, and Adventure Isle.
accessibilityLabel: Shanghai Disneyland, Shanghai Disney Resort, opened in 2016.

name: Hong Kong Disneyland
shortDescription: A compact, continuously expanding park on Lantau Island featuring Castle of Magical Dreams.
themeDescription: Main Street U.S.A., Fantasyland, Adventureland, Tomorrowland, Toy Story Land, and Marvel Universe.
